decisions.correction: Validate required claims and fail closed with a structured TokenError / 401 path.
decisions.defect: Malformed identity claims could escape the supported authentication-failure path.
decisions.risk: Invalid identity payloads could reach protected code paths without a normalized auth failure.

decisions.correction: Require tenant match before payment row creation and preserve 404 parity for foreign invoices.
decisions.defect: Invoice payment lookup lacked tenant scope.
decisions.risk: Cross-tenant invoice payment could mutate the wrong tenant or reveal invoice existence.

decisions.correction: Reject self-targeted role change attempts and unauthorized role changes for other tenants.
decisions.risk: Privilege escalation by granting a higher role to the actor’s own account.

decisions.defect: Protected Blackstone routes (/cases POST, /cases/{case_id} GET, /evaluate POST) lacked an explicit authentication guard.
decisions.risk: Unauthenticated access to case intake, case status, and claim evaluation endpoints.
decisions.correction: Added CurrentUser Depends(get_current_user) to each protected Blackstone route.

generation_method: Mapped each corrected defect to its affected path, security risk, exact correction, regression test, and validation result.
